Entries.Value:
邪恶包与纯洁包冲突

模组 '邪恶奇想' 和 '纯洁幻想' 不能同时安装！ WonderfulWhims 的所有功能都已经包含在 WickedWhims 中了，所以你只需要删除 WonderfulWhims 模组即可。
Entries.Original:
WICKED & WONDERFUL CONFLICT

The mods 'WickedWhims' & 'WonderfulWhims' cannot be installed at the same time! All of the features of WonderfulWhims are already in WickedWhims so all you need to do is delete the WonderfulWhims mod.

Entries.Value:
邪恶包与纯洁包冲突

模组 '邪恶奇想' 和 '纯洁幻想' 不能同时安装！ WonderfulWhims 的所有功能都已经包含在 WickedWhims 中了，所以你只需要删除 WonderfulWhims 模组即可。
Entries.Original:
WICKED & WONDERFUL CONFLICT

The mods 'WickedWhims' & 'WonderfulWhims cannot be installed at the same time! All of the features of WonderfulWhims are already in WickedWhims so all you need to do is delete the WonderfulWhims mod.

Entries.Value: 看起来 WickedWhims 的复杂存档数据处理失败。 为什么会发生这种情况？ • 您的操作系统或其他应用程序可能正在更改《The Sims 4》文件的访问权限，这可能阻止了存档文件数据的读取。 WickedWhims 的大部分存档数据不依赖于复杂的存档数据文件，因此您可以继续游戏，但某些功能的进度可能会丢失。
Entries.Original: Looks like WickedWhims complex save data failed to be processed. Why did this happen? • Your operating system or other applications might be altering The Sims 4 files access permissions which could be preventing reading save file data. Majority of WickedWhims save data doesn't depend on complex save data file, so you can continue playing, but some features might be missing progress.

Entries.Value: 看起来WickedWhims的复杂存档数据未能加载成功。 为什么会这样？ • WickedWhims的复杂存档数据似乎已损坏。 大多数WickedWhims的存档数据并不依赖于复杂的存档文件，所以你可以继续游戏，但某些功能可能缺少进度。
Entries.Original: Looks like WickedWhims complex save data failed to be loaded. Why did this happen? • WickedWhims complex save data appears to be corrupted. Majority of WickedWhims save data doesn't depend on complex save data file, so you can continue playing, but some features might be missing progress.

Entries.Value: 看起来邪恶幻想的存档数据未能保存成功。 为什么会这样？ • 获取支持以获得读取lastException文件的帮助。 你可以尝试等待几秒钟后再次保存，但如果问题重复出现，则需要进行调查。
Entries.Original: Looks like WickedWhims complex save data failed to be saved. Why did this happen? • Get support to receive help with reading the lastException file. You can try waiting a few seconds and save again but if this issue repeats then you need the problem to be investigated.

Entries.Value: 看起来 WickedWhims 的存档数据未能保存成功。 为什么会这样？ • 有些东西阻止了家庭的创建（可能是模组或游戏本身）。 创建家庭是保存 WickedWhims 数据的关键步骤。你可以尝试等待几秒钟后再试一次，但如果问题再次出现，则需要进一步调查。
Entries.Original: Looks like WickedWhims complex save data failed to be saved. Why did this happen? • Something prevented creation of a Sims Household (Mod or Game). Creation of a Household is a critical part of saving WickedWhims data. You can try waiting a few seconds and save again but if this issue repeats then you need the problem to be investigated.

Entries.Value: 看起来 WickedWhims 的存档数据未能保存成功。 为什么会这样？ • 有些东西阻止了模拟市民的创建（可能是模组或游戏本身）。 创建模拟市民是保存 WickedWhims 数据的关键步骤。你可以尝试等待几秒钟后再试一次，但如果问题再次出现，则需要进行调查。
Entries.Original: Looks like WickedWhims complex save data failed to be saved. Why did this happen? • Something prevented creation of a Sim (Mod or Game). Creation of a Sim is a critical part of saving WickedWhims data. You can try waiting a few seconds and save again but if this issue repeats then you need the problem to be investigated.

Entries.Value: 嘿！你至少一个小时没保存游戏了。别冒险失去你的进度，请现在就存个档。
Entries.Original: Hey! You haven't saved your game for at least an hour. Don't risk losing your game progress, please save the game right now.

Entries.Value: 使用身体选择器为模拟市民挑选自定义的裸体身体部位。可选的身体部位取决于模拟市民在创建模拟市民中的性别设置。 只有设计为与 WickedWhims 模组兼容的身体模组，才会在身体选择器中可用。 请注意，在 CAS 性别设置中更改了“身体框架”的模拟市民，可能会选择与其性别不兼容的身体部位，这可能导致他们在脱衣时随机出现衣物。
Entries.Original: Use the Body Selector to pick custom naked body parts for Sims. Available to select body parts depend on the Sim CAS Gender Settings. Only body mods that were made to be compatible with WickedWhims will be available in the Body Selector. Please note that Sims with altered Physical Frame in CAS Gender Settings can select body parts incompatible for their gender which might result in random clothing appearing on them when undressing.

You have installed the WickedWhims Censorship Mod (Streamer Mode)!

If correctly installed, censorship covers:
 • In-game native and WickedWhims nudity is censored.

Entries.Value: 打开 WickedWhims 视觉问题解决网站

脚本缺失错误！

未加载 'TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Scripts.ts4script' 文件！WickedWhims 模组将无法工作。 WickedWhims 脚本文件丢失或无法加载。以下是可能的原因：
  • 安装错误，游戏找不到脚本文件。不要把脚本文件（TS4SCRIPT）放到太多文件夹里。脚本文件只能放在一个层级的文件夹内。
  • 未启用脚本模组。打开游戏选项，进入"其他"菜单，需要允许使用脚本模组。
尝试解决这个问题后重启游戏，或访问 wickedwhimsmod.com 获取帮助。
Entries.Original:
SCRIPT MISSING ERROR!

The 'TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Scripts.ts4script' file was not loaded! The WickedWhims mod will not work. The WickedWhims script file is missing or cannot be loaded. Here are the potential reasons for this:
  • Bad installation, the game is unable to find the script file. Don't place script files (TS4SCRIPT) into too many folders. Script files can only be placed one-folder deep.
  • Script Mods are not enabled. Open Game Options and go into the 'Other' menu, Script Mods need to be allowed.
Try correcting this issue and restart the game or visit wickedwhimsmod.com for help.

Entries.Value:
文件不匹配错误

关键文件不匹配：
  • TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Tuning.package (PACKAGE)
  • TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Script.ts4script (TS4SCRIPT)
脚本文件（TS4SCRIPT）和包文件（PACKAGE）来自WickedWhims的不同版本！ 可能是WickedWhims的包文件被修改过，或者与脚本文件不匹配！ 脚本文件和包文件必须匹配，否则会出现错误和内容缺失。 如何修复： 1. 在Mods文件夹中找到并删除所有WickedWhims文件。 2. 重新下载WickedWhims。 3. 将WickedWhims安装到Mods文件夹。
Entries.Original:
FILES MISMATCH ERROR

Essential files are mismatched:
  • TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Tuning.package (PACKAGE)
  • TURBODRIVER_WickedWhims_Script.ts4script (TS4SCRIPT)
The script file (TS4SCRIPT) and package file (PACKAGE) are from two different releases of WickedWhims! The WickedWhims package file has been potentially edited or it is not matching the script file! Script and Package files have to match or you will encounter errors and missing content. How to fix: 1. Find and delete all WickedWhims files from the Mods folder. 2. Download WickedWhims again. 3. Install WickedWhims to the Mods folder.

Entries.Value:
重复安装错误

你在 'Mods' 文件夹中有多个 WickedWhims 的安装。 一次只能安装一个 WickedWhims，否则会出现错误和内容缺失。 解决方法： 1. 找到并删除 Mods 文件夹中的所有 WickedWhims 文件。 2. 重新下载 WickedWhims。 3. 将 WickedWhims 安装到 Mods 文件夹中。
Entries.Original:
DUPLICATE INSTALLATION ERROR

You have more than one installation of WickedWhims in the 'Mods' folder. Only one copy of WickedWhims can be installed at one time or you will encounter errors and missing content. How to fix: 1. Find and delete all WickedWhims files from the Mods folder. 2. Download WickedWhims again. 3. Install WickedWhims to the Mods folder.

You have a conflicting mod containing the "Sim Animating Rig" file. Only one "Sim Animating Rig" file can be loaded at the same time or sex animations will appear stretched and misaligned. How to fix: 1. Find and delete all mods containing the "Sim Animating Rig" file from the Mods folder. 2. Be confused about what is the "Sim Animating Rig" file. 3. Visit the website below for details.

WickedWhims is meant to work out-of-the-box without a need to adjust any settings. You are supposed to be able to access all content without having to do any extra work.

Entries.Value: 告诉我们你的想法！玩得开心吗？告诉我们哪些地方好！觉得不好？告诉我们怎样能做得更好！有什么建议？告诉我们该改进什么！\n\n你发送的反馈是匿名的，我们不会知道是谁发的，也不会尝试联系你。
Entries.Original: Let us know what you think! Having fun? Let us know what is good! Things are bad? Let us know what could be done better! You have a suggestion? Let us know what to improve!\n\nThe feedback you send is anonymous, we won't know who sent it and we won't try to contact you.

Entries.Value: 你确定要发送这条具有建设性的反馈信息吗？ 如果你的反馈是为了寻求解决某个运行问题的帮助，这绝不是正确的方式。绝大多数问题都出在用户端（比如模组冲突或安装错误）。由于你的消息是匿名的，我们无法联系你，你的问题也可能永远得不到解决。请改为直接联系我们！ 访问https://wickedwhimsmod.com/contact获取联系方式。
Entries.Original: Are you sure you want to send your hopefully constructive feedback message? If your feedback is about wanting to receive help solving an issue, this is NOT the way to share it. The vast majority of problems are on the user-end. Because your message is anonymous we will not contact you back and your problem will potentially never get solved. Please contact us instead! 创建并管理模拟市民协议

模拟市民协议是一项功能，允许您通过定义模拟市民的特权和限制来改变他们的行为。 如何使用模拟市民协议？ 1. 创建一个协议，并选择哪些模拟市民应受其影响。 2. 设定所选模拟市民必须遵守的规则。 3. 考虑更改名称和图标，以便更容易识别新创建的协议。 大功告成。现在，观察游戏中的模拟市民遵守新协议规则的情况。 请花些时间阅读所有描述，以更好地理解每项功能和规则的作用。使用协议完全是可选的，并非享受 WickedWhims 的必需条件。
Entries.Original: Sims Protocols is a feature that allows you to alter Sims behavior by defining their privileges and restrictions. How to use Sims Protocols? 1. Create a Protocol and select which Sims are supposed to be affected by it. 2. Set the rules that the selected Sims are required to obey. 3. Consider changing the name and icon for easier recognition of the newly created Protocol. And you're done. Now watch Sims in the game obey the rules of the newly created Protocol. Take your time and read all of the descriptions to better understand what each function and rule does. Using Protocols is completely optional and not required to enjoy playing with WickedWhims.

Entries.Value:
不喜欢正在播放的性爱动画？这里教你如何快速禁用它。

当模拟市民在进行性行为时，按住键盘上的 Shift 键并点击鼠标（Shift+点击）任意一个模拟市民以显示隐藏菜单。

在"邪恶"分类下，你可以找到"禁用当前播放的动画"互动选项，这将禁用当前正在播放的性爱动画。这个性爱动画将会保持禁用状态，直到你在"特定动画禁用器"菜单中手动启用它。
Entries.Original:
A sex animation is playing that you don't like? Here's how to quickly disable it.

While Sims are having sex, hold the Shift key on your keyboard and click with your mouse (Shift+Click) on a Sim to display the secret menu.

Under the 'Wicked' category you will find the 'Disable Currently Playing Animation' interaction which will disable the currently playing sex animation. This sex animation will remain disabled until manually enabled in the 'Specific Animations Disabler' menu.

Entries.Value:
缺少适当上下文标签的性爱动画？这里教你如何修复。

当模拟市民正在发生关系时，按住键盘上的 Shift 键并用鼠标点击（Shift+点击）一个模拟市民以显示隐藏菜单。

在"邪恶"分类下，你可以找到"修改当前播放动画标签"的互动选项，这将展示所有可用的上下文标签菜单。
在这个菜单中选择你认为适合该性爱动画的标签，并确认你的选择。
Entries.Original:
A sex animation is missing appropriate context tags? Here's how to fix that.

While Sims are having sex, hold the Shift key on your keyboard and click with your mouse (Shift+Click) on a Sim to display the secret menu.

Under the 'Wicked' category you will find the 'Modify Currently Playing Animation Tags' interaction which will display a menu with all available context tags.
Within this menu select the tags you find appropriate for the sex animation and confirm your selections.

Entries.Value:
性爱动画让模拟市民做了错误的动作？这里教你如何修复。

当模拟市民正在发生关系时，按住键盘上的 Shift 键并用鼠标点击（Shift+点击）一个模拟市民以显示隐藏菜单。

在"邪恶"分类下，你会找到"修改当前播放的动画角色"的互动选项，这将展示一个包含当前参与模拟市民作为演员的角色菜单。
选择你认为错误的那个演员角色，并将其性别角色更改为正确的。下次使用这个性爱动画时，它会按照你的设置分配角色。
Entries.Original:
A sex animation is making Sims do the wrong actions? Here's how to fix that.

While Sims are having sex, hold the Shift key on your keyboard and click with your mouse (Shift+Click) on a Sim to display the secret menu.

Under the 'Wicked' category you will find the 'Modify Currently Playing Animation Roles' interaction which will display a menu with present Sims as actors performing roles.
Select the actor role that you believe is incorrect and change its gender role to one that seems correct. Next time you use this sex animation it will assign roles the way you configured it.

Entries.Value:
想高效地创建一个动画播放列表吗？这里有一个简单的方法。

开始一段性爱互动，播放你喜欢的动画。如果你喜欢当前正在播放的性爱动画，用鼠标点击一个模拟市民，然后进入"性爱 -> 播放列表 -> 将当前动画添加到播放列表"，这将显示一个播放列表菜单。
在播放列表菜单中，你可以创建一个新的播放列表或将性爱动画添加到现有的播放列表。
Entries.Original:
Want to build a playlist of animations efficiently? Here's an easy way to do it.

Begin a sex interaction and play animations you might like. If you like the sex animation that's currently playing, click with your mouse on a Sim and go into 'Sex -> Playlist -> Add Current Animation to Playlist' which will display a menu with playlists.
Within the playlists menu you can either create a new playlist or add the sex animation to an existing playlist.

Entries.Value:
模拟市民在不合适的地点进行性行为？以下是解决办法：

首先确保模拟市民当前没有正在进行性行为，然后用鼠标点击该物体，进入邪恶-> 性爱控制。

在性爱控制类别下，你会发现针对该物体的不同自主行为调节选项。选择“将该物体从性爱自主行为中排除这一互动选项，即可防止该物体被自主行为系统调用。如果你以后想恢复，只需重复上述过程并重新启用该物体的自主行为即可。
Entries.Original:
Sims are using a location for sex but you don't like it? Here's how to solve it.

First make sure Sims aren't having sex, then click with your mouse on the object and go into 'Wicked -> Sex Control'.

Under the 'Sex Control' category you will find different options to adjust sex autonomy for that object and selecting the 'Exclude Object from Sex Autonomy' interaction will prevent that object from being used by Sex Autonomy. Repeat this process to enable back the sex autonomy on this object.

Entries.Value:
模拟市民在进行你并不想看到的性行为？以下是解决办法：

首先确保模拟市民当前没有正在进行性行为，然后按住键盘上的 Shift 键并用鼠标点击该市民（Shift+点击），以唤出秘密菜单。
邪恶
在邪恶类别下，你会找到“性爱”分类，其中包含“禁止该市民的性爱自主行为 这一互动选项。点击后，该市民将不再参与任何自主发起的性行为。如果你想恢复其自主性，只需重复上述过程并重新启用即可。
Entries.Original:
A Sim is having sex but you don't want them to do it? Here's how to solve it.

First make sure Sims aren't having sex, then hold the Shift key on your keyboard and click with your mouse (Shift+Click) on the Sim to display the secret menu.

Under the 'Wicked' category you will find the 'Sex' category and in it the 'Disable Sim for Sex Autonomy' interaction which will prevent that Sim from participating in Sex Autonomy. Repeat this process to enable back the sex autonomy on this Sim.

Entries.Original: If there's one thing that excites {0.SimFirstName} more than anything else, it's the sight of the one {M0.he}{F0.she} loves - naked, sweating and moaning.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}万万没想到，今天{M0.他}{F0.她}会亲眼撞见有模拟市民在{M0.他}{F0.她}面前上演活春宫。这可真是活久见！
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} had no expectations that today {M0.he}{F0.she} would find a Sim going at it right in front of {M0.his}{F0.her} eyes. You don't see that every day!

Entries.Value: 驱使模拟市民急切地追逐其性欲。

Entries.Original: Some mysterious power is making {0.SimFirstName} feel exceptionally lustful, as if under a spell.

Entries.Original: The mood is right and the day is special - waste no time, pick up a cutie and fool around.\n\nTo participate, have satisfying sex with a Sim.

Entries.Value: 升级心智控制：放荡不羁
继续升级心智控制：放荡不羁
{0.SimFirstName}已升级 SimRay 装置，使其能够心智控制模拟市民，令其变得放荡不羁。准备好狂欢了吗？
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} has upgraded the SimRay so it can Mind Control Sims to be "Promiscuous." Ready to get freaky?

Entries.Value: 好的，我们开始吧。你带路。
Entries.Original: Okay, let's do it. Lead the way.

Entries.Value: 抱歉，我不太明白你的意思，所以答案是否定的。
Entries.Original: Sorry, I'm not sure I understand what you're asking for so the answer is no.

Entries.Value: 嗯…这个我不太确定。还是不要了。
Entries.Original: Umm.. I'm uncertain about this. No.

Entries.Value: 那是个有趣的想法，但和我有什么关系呢？
Entries.Original: That's an interesting idea, but what does that have to do with me?

Entries.Value: 你能再解释一下你是什么意思吗？算了，当我没问，我没时间听。
Entries.Original: Could you explain what you mean again? Actually, never mind, I don't have the time for that.

Entries.Value: 我搞不懂你在说什么，所以我想...不行。
Entries.Original: I'm having trouble making sense of what you're saying, so I guess... no.

Entries.Value: 我不太确定你是否理解你提出的概念。呃，还是不要？
Entries.Original: I'm not sure I understand the concept you're proposing. Uh, no?

Entries.Value: 哦，让我想想，然后永远不告诉你答案。
Entries.Original: Oh, let me think about it and get back to you never.

Entries.Value: 我很难理解你为什么跟我聊这个。
Entries.Original: I'm struggling to understand why are you talking to me about this.

Entries.Value: 抱歉，我对和{M0.男人}{F0.女人}做那种事情不感兴趣。
Entries.Original: Sorry, I am not interested in doing that kind of thing with {M0.men}{F0.women}.

Entries.Value: 我干干净净，不用担心从我这儿染上什么脏东西。
Entries.Original: I'm all clean, no need to fear catching anything nasty from me.

Entries.Value: 我…觉得自己没事。大概吧？可能还是得去检查一下才能确定。
Entries.Original: I.. think I'm fine. Maybe? I might need to get tested to be sure.

Entries.Value: 噢，不…我感觉很不舒服。我最近好像染上了什么脏东西。
Entries.Original: Oh no, I'm not doing well. I caught something nasty recently.

Entries.Value: 我过得挺好的呀，谢谢关心。你刚才就是这意思，对吧？
Entries.Original: I'm doing well, thank you for asking. That's what you meant, right?

Entries.Value: 这关你什么事？我感觉好得很，不明白你为什么这么问。
Entries.Original: What's it to you? I'm feeling just fine, I don't understand why you would ask that.

Entries.Value: 对阴虱免疫的模拟市民，将不会再感染阴虱。
Entries.Original: Sims immune to Crabs no longer contract Crab Lice.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}感到{M0.他的}{F0.她的}生殖器周围瘙痒难耐。这会不会是什么严重的病？
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} is experiencing an itching sensation around {M0.his}{F0.her} genitals. Could this be something serious?

Entries.Value: 哦不！{0.SimFirstName}染上阴虱了！这些小虫子寄生在{M0.他的}{F0.她的}生殖器周围引起的剧烈瘙痒，不进行适当治疗是好不了的。
Entries.Original: Oh no! {0.SimFirstName} contracted Crab Lice! The intense itching caused by the little bugs living around {M0.his}{F0.her} genitalia is not going to clear out without proper treatment.

Entries.Value:
{0.SimName}感染了阴虱，这是一种寄生于人体生殖器部位的寄生虫，会引起剧烈瘙痒。通常通过与受感染的市民嘿咻或在受污染的床铺睡觉而感染。

阴虱不会自行离开，因此需要使用专门药物进行治疗。

杀虱洗剂可以在WW商店订购，也可以通过拜访专科医生获取。
Entries.Original:
{0.SimName} acquired Crab Lice, parasitic insects that infest human genital area and cause intense itching. Typically contracted through sexual intercourse with infected Sims or from sleeping in infested beds.

Pubic Lice do not voluntarily leave, so proper treatment with specialized medication is required.

Lice Killer Shampoo can be purchased from the Wicked Store or acquired from a Medical Specialist.

Entries.Value:

这种由腐蚀性酸液、粘稠液体和紫色染料组成的复杂配方，将彻底清除你身上的每一只阴虱寄生虫，并提供超过 24 小时的保护。我们的产品“绝对”不含任何可能损害您健康的化学物质。\n\n注意：除虱洗发水只能从模拟市民的背包中点击使用，且必须在洗澡或泡澡期间。
Entries.Original: This complex formula of corrosive acid, slimy goo, and purple dye will completely remove any crabby bugs from your body and protect it for more than 24 hours. Our product definitely does not contain any chemicals that may cause damage to your health.\n\nThe Lice Killing Shampoo can only be used from Sim inventory and only during a shower or a bath.

Entries.Value: 成为膀胱炎无症状感染者
Entries.Original: Turn into Burning Bladder Sleeper Agent

Entries.Value:
{0.SimName}感染了膀胱炎，这是一种由细菌入侵膀胱引发的疾病，会导致排尿后灼痛。通常通过与受感染的市民发生嘿咻关系感染。

可以在手机上的ww菜单下找到拜访专科医生的选项。

{0.SimName} acquired Burning Bladder Infection, bacteria that affects the bladder causing burning pain after urination. Typically contracted through sexual intercourse with infected Sims.

Burning Bladder Infection requires proper treatment from a medical specialist.
Visit a Medical Specialist using Sim phone under the Wicked category.

Entries.Original: Visit a certified healthcare provider to address concerns related to Crab Lice and receive medication or treatment for this infestation.

Entries.Value: 在一间光线充足的小诊室里，{0.SimFirstName}与一名身著白大褂、表情慈祥的医师讨论{M0.他}{F0.她}对感染阴虱的担忧。医师在仔细检查后确认了阴虱的存在。然后她拿出一瓶洗剂，解释说这是专门治疗阴虱的配方。她与{0.SimFirstName}对视，并提供了两种选择：1：在诊所内由医师协助下使用洗剂，这样可以确保正确使用。2：{0.SimFirstName}把洗剂拿回家使用。
Entries.Original: In a small, well-lit clinic room, {0.SimFirstName} discusses {0.SimPronounPossessiveIndependent} concern about a possible crab lice infestation with a healthcare provider. The provider, wearing a white coat and a compassionate expression, examines {0.SimFirstName} carefully and confirms the presence of crab lice. She then presents a bottle of specialized shampoo, explaining that it's specifically formulated to treat crab lice. She locks eyes with {0.SimFirstName} and offers two options: {0.SimPronounSubjective|xxUpper} can use the shampoo right there in the clinic with her assistance, ensuring proper application, or {0.SimPronounSubjective} can take the shampoo and use it at home.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}同意在诊所使用专用洗剂。医师友善地引导{0.SimFirstName}到诊所的私人区域，然后嘱咐{M0.他}{F0.她}脱掉衣服并并淋浴。医师戴上乳胶手套，开始轻柔且不失稳健地为{0.SimFirstName}的敏感部位涂抹洗剂。她的触摸既专业又亲密，有条不紊地将洗剂涂抹到{0.SimFirstName}的皮肤上。让{0.SimFirstName}感觉既安心又刺激。医师的双手熟练地移动著，确保洗剂可以到达每个患处。治疗结束后，她退后一步，愉快地告诉{0.SimFirstName}，{M0.他}{F0.她}的阴虱已成功治愈!
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} agreed to the idea of using the specialized shampoo at the clinic. The healthcare provider gently guides {0.SimPronounObjective} to a private area in the clinic, then asks to undress and step into the shower. She puts on latex gloves and begins to gently but firmly apply the shampoo to {0.SimFirstName}'s sensitive pubic area. Her touch is clinical yet intimate, as she methodically works the shampoo into {0.SimFirstName}'s skin. {0.SimFirstName} finds {0.SimPronounReflexive} caught between the professionalism of the situation and the arousing nature of the contact. The healthcare provider hands move expertly, ensuring the shampoo reaches every affected area. As the treatment concludes, she steps back and cheerfully informs {0.SimFirstName} that {0.SimPronounPossessiveDependent} crab lice has been successfully treated!

Entries.Original: There’s a light trickling sensation running down {0.SimFirstName}’s leg. It appears that {M0.his}{F0.her} pad has done it’s duty but in the end could only absorb so much. {0.SimFirstName} should deal with this by applying a replacement immediately, it’d be unhygienic to leave it in such a state.

Entries.Value: 卫生巾完成了它的使命，但吸收能力终究有限！持续的出血已经毁了{0.SimFirstName}的衣物。血液顺着{M0.他}{F0.她}的腿流下，在布料上留下了显眼的污渍。这状况可真够狼狈的，{0.SimFirstName}该换个新的了。
Entries.Original: The pad did it’s job but it could only absorb so much! Further bleeding has now ruined {0.SimFirstName}’s clothing. The blood has rushed down {M0.his}{F0.her} legs leaving noticeable stains across the material. This is a sorry state to be in, {0.SimFirstName} should make use of a replacement.

Entries.Value: 卫生巾已经尽力了，但在如此大量的血液面前毫无招架之力。血液渗透了棉质材料，顺着{0.SimFirstName}的双腿流下，时间越长，{M0.他的}{F0.她的}衣物就越遭殃。这卫生巾肯定不能再用了，必须尽快找到替换品！
Entries.Original: The pad tried as hard as it could but in the face of such a heavy flow it stood no chance. Blood has seeped through the cotton and down {0.SimFirstName}’s legs, ruining {M0.his}{F0.her} clothing the longer it lingers there. There’s definitely no further use out of this pad, a replacement must be found ASAP!

Entries.Value: 一股温热的液体正顺着{0.SimFirstName}的腿缓缓流下。看来{M0.他}{F0.她}的卫生棉条已经尽力，但终究吸收能力有限。{0.SimFirstName}应该立刻换上新的来解决这个问题，让它保持这种状态可不卫生。
Entries.Original: There’s a light trickling sensation running down {0.SimFirstName}’s leg. It appears that {M0.his}{F0.her} tampon has done it’s duty but in the end could only absorb so much. {0.SimFirstName} should deal with this by applying a replacement immediately, it’d be unhygienic to leave it in such a state.

Entries.Value: 卫生棉条完成了它的使命，但吸收能力终究有限！持续的出血已经弄脏了{0.SimFirstName}的衣服。血迹顺着{M0.他的}{F0.她的}双腿流下，在衣物上留下了明显的污渍。这状况可真够狼狈的，{0.SimFirstName}应该换一件衣服。
Entries.Original: The tampon did it’s job but it could only absorb so much! Further bleeding has now ruined {0.SimFirstName}’s clothing. The blood has rushed down {M0.his}{F0.her} legs leaving noticeable stains across the material. This is a sorry state to be in, {0.SimFirstName} should make use of a replacement.

Entries.Value: 卫生棉条已经尽力了，但面对如此汹涌的量，它也无能为力。经血浸透了棉条，顺着 {0.SimFirstName}的腿流下，滞留得越久，衣物就被毁得越厉害。这根卫生棉条肯定不能再用了，得赶紧找个替换的！
Entries.Original: The tampon tried as hard as it could but in the face of such a heavy flow it stood no chance. Blood has seeped through the cotton and down {0.SimFirstName}’s legs, ruining {M0.his}{F0.her} clothing the longer it lingers there. There’s definitely no further use out of this tampon, a replacement must be found ASAP!

Entries.Value: 由于服用的药物，{0.SimFirstName}的经期情绪波动被神奇地抑制住了。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}'s menstrual mood swings have been magically suppressed thanks to the substances {M0.he}{F0.she} took.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}无法摆脱那种充斥在脑海与肠胃间的翻腾恶心感。这种感觉就像是{M0.他}{F0.她}置身于惊涛骇浪中的一叶孤舟。{0.SimFirstName}现在提不起劲做任何事，而且完全没有任何食欲。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} can’t shake the queasy feeling going through {M0.his}{F0.her} mind and through {M0.his}{F0.her} gut. It’s like being on a small boat in the midst of rocky waters. {0.SimFirstName} doesn’t have the energy to do anything and no appetite at all.

Entries.Value: 现在谁都别想来招惹{0.SimFirstName}。{M0.他的}{F0.她的}生理周期带来的巨大压力让整个世界都变得面目可憎。任何胆敢上前搭讪的人最好自求多福，因为{M0.他}{F0.她}现在看谁都带火，已经彻底暴走了！
Entries.Original: Right now is not a good time for any Sim to be messing with {0.SimFirstName}. The stress that {M0.his}{F0.her} menstrual cycle can cause just makes the world itself so much more annoying. Any meddling Sim better watch out because {M0.he}{F0.she} is seeing red!

Entries.Value: 感觉有些不太对劲。这也许是{M0.他}{F0.她}生理周期的副作用，但 {0.SimFirstName} 怎么也无法摆脱那种天旋地转的眩晕感，{M0.他}{F0.她}仿佛周围的世界都在失去控制地疯狂旋转。
Entries.Original: Something doesn’t feel quite right. It may be a side effect from {M0.his}{F0.her} monthly cycle but {0.SimFirstName} can’t shake this dizzying feeling that the world around {0.SimPronounObjective} is spinning uncontrollably.

Entries.Value: 似乎没人理解或在乎{0.SimFirstName}此刻的处境。现在，{M0.他}{F0.她}完全无法控制{M0.他}{F0.她}的情绪。每月一次的生理周期，把{0.SimPronounObjective}折腾得彻底崩溃。
Entries.Original: No one seems to understand or care about what {0.SimFirstName} is going through right now. At the moment, {M0.he}{F0.she} can’t seem to keep {M0.his}{F0.her} emotions in check. The effects of having a monthly cycle has left {0.SimPronounObjective} in a complete wreck.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}身体里传来一阵难以忽视的痛感。这种周期性的隐痛从不是愉快的体验，而这次尤其难熬。但愿这股不适能尽快消退。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} is getting a painful sensation emanating from {M0.his}{F0.her} body that {M0.he}{F0.she} just can't ignore. This aching feeling that comes during one's cycle is never an enjoyable experience but this time it’s especially difficult. Hopefully this distress will subside.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}现在整个人都很焦虑，无法集中注意力。{M0.他}{F0.她}坐立不安，还会为些小事为难自己。{0.SimPronounReflexive}经历这些的时候，拥有子宫可真不是什么好玩的事。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} is all nerves right now and can’t seem to focus. {M0.He}{F0.She} is having difficulty keeping still and is stressing {0.SimPronounReflexive} over minor things. Having a uterus is no fun when you have to go through this.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}现在真的很有兴致。{M0.他}{F0.她}似乎突然有股冲动，想好好放纵一下。也许是血液在沸腾，但{M0.他}{F0.她}此刻确实感到格外兴奋。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}’s really in the mood for some action. {M0.He}{F0.She} seems to have a sudden urge to get down and dirty. Maybe it’s the blood pumping but {M0.he}{F0.she} is feeling especially titillated right now.

Entries.Value: 那个日子到了！{0.SimFirstName}正在排卵期！
Entries.Original: It's that day of the cycle! {0.SimFirstName} is ovulating!

Entries.Value: 具有“超强吸收力”特征的模拟市民，无需频繁更换卫生棉条和卫生巾。
Entries.Original: Sims with Extra Absorbency won't have to change tampons and pads so often.

Entries.Value:
{0.SimFirstName}很快就要迎来{M0.他}{F0.她}的第一次月经了。最好提前准备，购买卫生棉条和卫生巾，以免{0.SimPronounObjective}经血侧漏。
或者开始服用避孕药，以阻止自然的月经周期。

卫生棉条、卫生巾和避孕药均可通过电脑订购。
Entries.Original:
{0.SimFirstName} will soon have {M0.his}{F0.her} period. It's best to prepare and purchase Tampons and Pads to protect {0.SimPronounObjective} from leaking menstrual blood.
Or start using Birth Control Pills to prevent the natural Menstrual Cycle.

Tampons, Pads, and Birth Control can be ordered from a computer.

Entries.Value:
{0.SimFirstName}很快就要迎来{M0.他}{F0.她}的第一次月经了。最好提前准备，购买卫生棉条和卫生巾，以免{0.SimPronounObjective}经血侧漏。

{0.SimFirstName} will soon have {M0.his}{F0.her} first period. It's best to prepare and purchase Tampons and Pads to protect {0.SimPronounObjective} from leaking menstrual blood.

Entries.Value:
这条消息旨在告知你可以调整与怀孕模式相关的设置。

你家中的一名模拟市民即将迎来第一次月经。这也会发生在世界中的其他模拟市民身上，具体取决于你的设置。
你可以更改或决定模拟市民如何以及是否体验月经周期。请使用下方按钮来选择你喜欢的怀孕配置方式。

如果你已经调整过怀孕设置了，可以安全忽略这条消息。
Entries.Original:
This message is meant to inform you about the possibility of adjusting settings related to Pregnancy Modes.

A Sim in your household is about have their first period. This will happen to other Sims in the world, depending on your settings.
You can change how and in what way, if at all, Sims will experience their Menstrual Cycle. Use the button below to decide about your preferred Pregnancy configuration.

If you already adjusted your Pregnancy settings you can safely ignore this message.

Entries.Value: 你好 {0.SimFirstName}！ 这是你的Kaya 月经周期追踪器报告。 月经周期 • 目前你在周期的第 {1.Number} 天，总共 {2.Number} 天。 经前综合症（PMS） • 下一次经前综合症将在 {3.Number} 天{P3.s} 后到来。 月经期 • 下一次月经将在 {4.Number} 天{P4.s} 后开始。 生育能力 • 下一个最易受孕期将在 {5.Number} 天{P5.s} 后到来。 • 下一个排卵日将在 {6.Number} 天{P6.s} 后到来。 感谢你使用Kaya 月经周期追踪器，汉化小玉，全网同名。
Entries.Original: Hello {0.SimFirstName}! This is your Kaya Period Tracker Report. Menstrual Cycle • Currently you're at day {1.Number} of your cycle, out of {2.Number} days. PMS • Next PMS is coming up in {3.Number} day{P3.s}. Period • Next Period starts in {4.Number} day{P4.s}. Fertility • The Next Most Fertile Day is coming up in {5.Number} day{P5.s}. • The Next Ovulation Day is coming up in {6.Number} day{P6.s}. Thank you for using the Kaya Period Tracker.

{0.SimFirstName} 会在{M0.他的}{F0.她的}卫生棉条或卫生巾被彻底用透之前进行更换。

Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} will change {M0.his}{F0.her} tampon or pad before it is at risk of leaking.

Entries.Original: This is the current Auto Use type.

Entries.Original: Ask for a Tampon or Pad

Entries.Value: 由制药行业的科学先驱设计，并在下一代制造中心生产。邪恶镇静药是针对经前期综合征引起的情绪波动和疼痛的终极解决方案。
Entries.Original: Designed by the Scientific Pioneers in the Pharmaceutical Industry and produced at the Next Generation Manufacturing Centers, the Wicked Chill Pill is the definitive answer to the unwanted mood swings and pains caused by the Premenstrual Syndrome.

Entries.Value: Kaya卫生棉条与卫生巾套装盒
一盒含7个卫生棉条和7片卫生巾。混合使用两者能最好地防止经期大量出血。\n\n打开盒子，获得7个独立包装的卫生棉条和7片独立包装的卫生巾。
Entries.Original: Box of 7 tampons and 7 pads. A mix of both will guarantee the best protection from heavy menstrual bleeding.\n\nUnpack the box and get 7 wrapped tampons and 7 wrapped pads.

Entries.Value: 14 片装卫生巾盒。应对经期后期的轻量级流量日的绝佳选择。\n\n拆开包装盒，即可获得 14 片独立包装的卫生巾。
Entries.Original: Box of 14 menstrual pads. Great choice when you need protection from the light-flow days.\n\nUnpack the box and get 14 wrapped pads.

Entries.Value: 14 支装卫生棉条盒。一款圆润且精致的女性卫生产品，助你保护经期的私密性。\n\n拆开包装盒，即可获得 14 支独立包装的卫生棉条。
Entries.Original: Box of 14 tampons. A sleek and sophisticated feminine hygiene product to help keep your period private.\n\nUnpack the box and get 14 wrapped tampons.

Entries.Value: Kaya 舒适有机棉卫生棉条。吸收芯周围包裹着一层安全护膜，可防止纤维脱落，并使取出过程更加顺滑。\n\n“拆开包装，即可获得一个带导管的卫生棉条。
Entries.Original: Comfortable organic cotton Kaya Tampons security veil around the absorbent core that prevents fiber shedding and makes for softer extract.\n\nUnwrap it to get a tampon with an applicator.

Entries.Value: 采用100%认证有机棉制成，Kaya卫生巾不含任何化学物质、合成材料或染料。日用夜用皆可吸收良好。\n\n打开包装即可获得一片卫生巾。
Entries.Original: Made with 100% certified organic cotton, Kaya Pads use no chemicals, synthetics, or dyes. Great absorbency for day and night usage.\n\nUnwrap it to get a menstrual pad.

Entries.Value: Kaya 舒适有机棉卫生棉条：吸收芯外包覆安全护膜，防止纤维脱落并确保取出过程更加顺滑。\n\n每天至少通过点击小人背包中的棉条使用一次。增加更换频率可降低潜在风险的发生概率。
Entries.Original: Comfortable organic cotton Kaya Tampons security veil around the absorbent core that prevents fiber shedding and makes for softer extract.\n\nUse it at least once a day by clicking on it in Sim inventory. Replacing it more often decreases the chance of potential issues.

Entries.Value: 采用100%认证有机棉制成，Kaya卫生巾不含任何化学物质、合成材料或染料。日用夜用皆可吸收良好。\n\n每天至少使用一次，在模拟市民的库存中点击它即可使用。更频繁地更换可以降低潜在问题的风险。
Entries.Original: Made with 100% certified organic cotton, Kaya Pads use no chemicals, synthetics, or dyes. Great absorbency for day and night usage.\n\nUse it at least once a day by clicking on it in Sim inventory. Replacing it more often decreases the chance of potential issues.

Entries.Value: 独立包装的预先湿润棉柔巾，采用有机棉制成。可用于身体任何部位以保持清新。
Entries.Original: Individually wrapped pre-moistened towelettes made with organic cotton. Use them anywhere on your body to freshen up.

Entries.Value: 用这款具有补水和清爽功效的玫瑰水喷雾，喷走所有的污垢并平衡皮肤的 pH 值。注意：请避开口部和眼部使用！
Entries.Original: Spray the smut away and balance the pH of your skin with the hydrating and refreshing rosewater mist. Avoid spraying it in mouth or eyes!

Entries.Value: 点击一个物体并从邪恶类别中选择性爱。
Entries.Original: Click on an object and select Sex from the Wicked category.

Entries.Value: 点击物体并从邪恶类别中选择性爱。模拟市民通常需要拥有良好的关系基础才能开启此互动。
Entries.Original: Click on an object and select Sex from the Wicked category. Sims need to have a good relationship to be able to have sex.

Entries.Value: 在公共场合与某人发生性关系
点击物体并从邪恶类别中选择性爱。模拟市民通常需要拥有良好的关系基础才能开启此互动。
Entries.Original: Click on an object and select Sex from the Wicked category. Sims need to have a good relationship to be able to have sex.

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>禁止在地块内进行性行为（自主标志）</font>
Entries.Original: <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> (Autonomy Sign)

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>用地内禁止性爱</font>指示牌可阻止所有模拟市民在用地内尝试性爱。此指示牌可放置于用地的任何位置以生效。\n\n<font color='#3AAF69'>房间内允许性爱</font>指示牌可覆盖此指示牌在其所放置房间内的效果，使性爱仅在该房间内被允许。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> sign prevents all Sims from attempting to have sex on the lot. This sign can be placed anywhere on the lot to take effect.\n\nThe <font color='#3AAF69'>Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign overrides the effect of this sign for the room it is placed in. Making sex allowed only in that room.

Entries.Value: 用地内禁止性爱（自主行为指示牌）【隐形】
Entries.Original: **INVISIBLE** <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> (Autonomy Sign)

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>用地内禁止性爱</font>指示牌可阻止所有模拟市民在用地内尝试性爱。此指示牌可放置于用地的任何位置以生效。进入生活模式后它将消失。\n\n<font color='#3AAF69'>房间内允许性爱</font>指示牌可覆盖此指示牌在其所放置房间内的效果，使性爱仅在该房间内被允许。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> sign prevents all Sims from attempting to have sex on the lot. This sign can be placed anywhere on the lot to take effect. It will disappear when in Live Mode.\n\nThe <font color='#3AAF69'>Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign overrides the effect of this sign for the room it is placed in. Making sex allowed only in that room.

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>房内禁止性爱</font>（自主行为指示牌）
Entries.Original: <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted In Room</font> (Autonomy Sign)

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>房内禁止性爱</font>指示牌可阻止该房间内的所有模拟市民尝试性爱。此指示牌必须放置在房间内才能生效，并且仅影响该房间内的模拟市民。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign prevents all Sims in a room with this sign from attempting to have sex. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room.

Entries.Value: 房内禁止性爱（自主行为指示牌）【隐形】
Entries.Original: **INVISIBLE** <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted In Room</font> (Autonomy Sign)

Entries.Value: <font color='#EC262E'>房内禁止性爱</font>指示牌可阻止该房间内的所有模拟市民尝试性爱。此指示牌必须放置在房间内才能生效，并且仅影响该房间内的模拟市民。进入生活模式后它将消失。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign prevents all Sims in a room with this sign from attempting to have sex. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room. It will disappear when in Live Mode.

Entries.Value: <font color='#3AAF69'>房间内允许性爱</font>（自主行为指示牌）
<font color='#3AAF69'>房间内允许性爱</font>指示牌可覆盖其所在房间内的<font color='#EC262E'>用地内禁止性爱</font>指示牌效果，使性爱仅在该房间内被允许。此指示牌必须放置在房间内才能生效，并且仅影响该房间内的模拟市民。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#3AAF69'>Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign overrides the <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> sign for the room it is placed in. Making sex allowed only in that room. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room.

Entries.Value: 房间内允许性爱（自主行为指示牌）【隐形】
<font color='#3AAF69'>室内允许性爱</font>”标志会覆盖其所在房间的“<font color='#EC262E'>地段禁止互动</font>”标志。这使得互动仅在该房间内被允许。此标志必须放置在室内方可生效，且仅影响该房间内的模拟市民。在生活模式下，该标志将自动隐藏。
Entries.Original: The <font color='#3AAF69'>Sex Permitted In Room</font> sign overrides the <font color='#EC262E'>No Sex Permitted On Lot</font> sign for the room it is placed in. Making sex allowed only in that room. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room. It will disappear when in Live Mode.

Entries.Value: 邪恶墙壁性爱标记（隐形）

Entries.Value: <font color='#3AAF69'>本房间内允许裸体</font> (自主行为告示牌)

<font color='#3AAF69'>本房间内允许裸体</font>告示牌允许所在房间内的所有小人主动脱衣。此告示牌必须放置在房间内部才能生效，且仅会影响该房间内的小人。

Entries.Original:
The <font color='#3AAF69'>Nudity Permitted In Room</font> sign allows all Sims in a room with this sign to explicitly undress. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room.

With the 'Nudity Permitted Autonomy Signs Influence' setting enabled, this sign allows Sims, within a room with this sign, to undress without limits.
The <font color='#EC262E'>No Nudity Permitted On Lot</font> sign will be overridden by this sign for the room it is placed in. Making nudity allowed only in that room.

Entries.Value: ** 不可见**<font color='#3AAF69'>本房间内允许裸体</font> (自主行为告示牌)

当开启“允许裸体自主告示牌影响”设置时，此告示牌将允许所在房间内的小人无限制地脱去衣服。
本房间内的<font color='#EC262E'>本处地段禁止裸体</font>效果将被此告示牌覆盖。使得裸体行为仅在该房间内被允许。
Entries.Original:
The Invisible <font color='#3AAF69'>Nudity Permitted In Room</font> sign allows all Sims in a room with this sign to explicitly undress. This sign has to be placed within a room to take effect, and it only affects Sims within that room. It will disappear when in Live Mode.

With the 'Nudity Permitted Autonomy Signs Influence' setting enabled, this sign allows Sims, within a room with this sign, to undress without limits.
The <font color='#EC262E'>No Nudity Permitted On Lot</font> sign will be overridden by this sign for the room it is placed in. Making nudity allowed only in that room.

Entries.Value:
可操控的模拟市民舞者会在顾客观看时自动参与“点点乐”游戏。

“点点乐”是一款简单的游戏，玩家需要主动点击舞者周围漂浮的橙色光点。点击光点可以提升舞者的舞蹈表现，从而增加获得的小费金额，并减少疲劳感，让舞者能跳得更久。

此功能可在脱衣舞俱乐部设置中关闭。
Entries.Original:
Playable Sims Dancers automatically participate in the "Click-The-Spot" game when clients watch them.

Click-The-Spot is a simple game where the player needs to actively participate in clicking the glowing orange spot floating in the air around the dancing Sim.
Clicking the spot increases Sim dancing performance which increases the value of received tips and decreases the tiredness so the Sim can dance longer.

This functionality can be disabled in the Strip Club settings.

Entries.Value:
购买舞蹈杆或舞蹈点标记是舞者进行舞台舞蹈和客户观看舞蹈的必要条件。

请在建筑模式中寻找“钢管”或“舞蹈位点”，并将它们放置在空旷区域或舞台上。
顾客会聚集在周围并寻找舒适的座位观看。建议在钢管或舞蹈位点周围摆放座椅。
Entries.Original:
Buying a Dancing Pole or a Dancing Spot Marker is required for dancers to Stage Dance and for clients to watch them.

Look for a 'Dancing Pole' or a 'Dancing Spot' in Build Mode and place one in an open area or at a stage.
Clients will gather around and look for a comfortable seat to watch dancers. It's suggested to place seats around the Dancing Pole or Dancing Spot.

Entries.Value:
需要分配大腿舞座位，顾客观众才能请求私密舞蹈。
俱乐部内的任何双人椅、沙发、躺椅或单椅都可以被分配为膝上舞座位。
至少建造一个私人房间，在里面放一个座位，然后点击它选择“分配膝上舞点位”。任何请求舞蹈的顾客观众都会使用分配的座位来享受膝上舞。

所有被分配为膝上舞座位的座位将专用于膝上舞。

点击任意舞者，分配“魅惑顾客观众”任务，即可让舞者和顾客观众开启私密舞蹈。
Entries.Original:
Assigning Lap Dancing Seats is required for clients to ask for a private dance.
Any Loveseat, Sofa, Recliner, or Chair in the club can be assigned as a Lap Dancing Seat.
Build at least one private room, place a seat inside it, and click on it to 'Assign Lap Dancing Spot'. Any client asking for a dance will use the assigned seats to receive a lap dance.

All seats assigned as Lap Dancing Seats are exclusively used for lap dancing.

Click on any Dancer and assign the 'Charming Clients' task to allow the dancer and the clients to initiate private dances.

Dancers on this spot will perform dances that do not involve a dancing pole.\n\nPut this object in places where dancers are meant to dance when assigned the dancing role. Use the invisible variant to make the dancing spots not visible in Live Mode.

Entries.Value: 邪恶脱衣舞俱乐部舞蹈钢管
独立式旋转舞蹈钢管是新开张的脱衣舞俱乐部轻松便捷的选择。其亮面涂装和旋转功能为舞者的表演增添了额外的震撼力，让顾客们目不转睛。\n\n由“诺瓦与暗夜模拟市民公司”提供。
Entries.Original: Freestanding spin dancing poles are an easy and convenient choice for blooming Strip Club businesses. The shiny finish and rotating function enhance dancers performance with additional 'wow factor' that makes customers heads turn.\nProvided by the Noir and Dark Sims Inc.

Entries.Value: 必须购买吧台，俱乐部才能赚到真金白银。向顾客售卖饮品是脱衣舞俱乐部的主要收入来源。\n\n请在建筑模式中寻找“吧台”，并将其放置在俱乐部的某个位置。被雇佣的舞者将被指派为“调酒师”角色，负责向顾客售卖饮品。
Entries.Original:
Buying a Bar is required for the club to earn any real money. Selling drinks to clients is the main revenue source of a Strip Club.

Look for a 'Bar' in Build Mode and place one somewhere in the club. A hired dancer will be assigned the 'Bartender' role and sell drinks to clients.

Entries.Value: 嘿老板，我们的酒吧用品快用完了。客人点的饮料我们都准备不了了。你能再订购一些物资吗？
Entries.Original: Hey boss, we're running out of Bar Supplies. Clients are ordering drinks we can't prepare. Could you order more supplies?

Entries.Value: 嘿老板，我们的酒吧用品用完了。你得补货了，不然我们没法再卖饮料了。能再订购些物资吗？
Entries.Original: Hey boss, we are out of Bar Supplies. We can't sell any more drinks until you restock the bar. Could you order more supplies?

Entries.Value:
高价格涨幅和吧台补给不足会降低顾客购买饮品的意愿。

补给短缺意味着能提供的饮品种类减少，而价格上涨则会降低这些饮品的吸引力。当你无法向顾客供应其最喜爱的饮品时，请降低“价格涨幅”，使其他饮品更具诱惑力。

点击任何吧台即可进入脱衣舞俱乐部的“价格涨幅”菜单。
Entries.Original:
High Price Markup and Low Bar Supplies decrease the likeliness of clients purchasing drinks.

Shortage of supplies means fewer drinks to offer, and increased price makes them less appealing for purchase. When you can't sell the client's favorite drinks, lower the 'Price Markup' to make other drinks an attractive offer.

Click on any Bar to access the Strip Club Price Markup menu.

Entries.Value:
酒吧补给是为顾客调制饮品的必需品。每调制一份饮品都会消耗补给，当补给耗尽时，将无法再调制任何饮品。

您可以点击任意吧台进入脱衣舞俱乐部“订购补给”菜单来购买物资。
已购买的物资会累计到订购总量中，并根据下单时间，在次日的中午或午夜送达。
物资成本取决于顾客所点饮品的底价。售卖高档饮品需要购买更昂贵的补给物资。
Entries.Original:
Bar Supplies are required to prepare drinks for clients. Each prepared drink consumes supplies, and when they run out, drinks cannot be prepared anymore.

You can order supplies by clicking on any Bar to access the Strip Club 'Order Supplies' menu.
Purchased supplies add up to the total of ordered supplies that will be delivered the next day at either noon or midnight depending when the order is made.
The cost of supplies depends on the base price of the drinks ordered by clients. Selling expensive drinks requires purchasing expensive supplies.

Entries.Value: 这里的一切都很好！你是个棒极了的老板，我对我们的顾客也再满意不过了。
Entries.Original: Things here are great! You're a fantastic boss and I couldn't be happier with our customers.

Entries.Value: 我每天起床都充满动力，迫不及待想为我们的顾客带来欢乐。
Entries.Original: I get up each day, excited to bring joy to our customers.

Entries.Value: 我工作中的每一件事都让我开心！这也能让我们的顾客开心！
Entries.Original: Everything about my work makes me happy! And that makes our customers happy!

Entries.Value: 我每天醒来都在思考如何能继续给我们的顾客留下深刻印象。我非常喜欢在这里工作的挑战感！
Entries.Original: I wake up every day thinking about ways that I can continue to impress our customers. I love the challenge of working here!

Entries.Value: 我会告诉我的所有{M1.男性}{F1.女性}朋友，让他们也试着来这儿应聘。这是我做过最棒的工作！
Entries.Original: I tell all of my {M1.male}{F1.female} friends that they should try and get hired here. It's the best job I've ever had!

Entries.Value: 这地方还不错。我有些想法，可以让这地方变得更好，我想和你分享一下。
Entries.Original: This place is pretty good. I have some ideas about how to make it better that I'd really like to share with you.

Entries.Value: 在这里工作挺不错的。要是这儿有时候别那么黏糊糊的就更好了…
Entries.Original: This is a pretty nice place to work. It'd be better if things were a little less sticky sometimes...

Entries.Value: 我在这里过得还算开心…我很享受和顾客们打交道的过程。
Entries.Original: I'm fairly happy here... I enjoy interacting with the customers.

Entries.Value: 在这儿工作挺有成就感的。大家相处得很愉快，我也觉得自己受到了重视。对此我很满意。
Entries.Original: The work here is rewarding. We get along well, and I feel valued. I'm satisfied with that.

Entries.Value: 我感觉怎么样？嗯…我想，工作表现还可以更好吧。但另一方面，情况也绝对可能更糟…我想，维持现状我也没意见。
Entries.Original: How do I feel? Hmm... Well, work could be better I suppose. But on the other hand, work could definitely be worse... I guess I'm OK with things just the way they are.

Entries.Value: 工作就是工作…我只是来混口饭吃而已。
Entries.Original: Work is what work is... It's just a means to an end for me.
Things are alright. Thanks for asking.

Entries.Value: 只要让我准时拿到薪水，你就不会听到我的任何抱怨。
Entries.Original: Just let me earn my paycheck and you won't hear any complaints out of me.

Entries.Value: 还算过得去。你要是多给我发点工资，说不定我就更卖力了。
Entries.Original: Things are OK. You could always pay me more money and see if I improve.

Entries.Value: 如果讨厌这份工作能让我升职，那现在这地方归我管了！
Entries.Original: If hating this job could get me promoted, I'd be running this place!

Entries.Value: 我对现在的工作感觉如何？也就那样吧！
Entries.Original: How am I feeling about my job? Meh!

Entries.Value: 我觉得一切都还行吧。上班，拿工资…嗯，这就是工作呗。
Entries.Original: I guess things are just fine. I come to work, get paid... Yup, that's a job alright.

Entries.Value: 我来这儿就是为了赚钱。我干活，你付钱，咱们这样就挺好。
Entries.Original: I'm really just here to earn money. I put in the work, you pay me, and we'll get along just fine.

Entries.Value: 我每天醒来都在想，要怎么做才能让你更满意。我真的很希望能升职。
Entries.Original: I wake up every day thinking about ways that I can continue to impress you. I wish I could get a promotion.

Entries.Value: 你这个老板也太差劲了。我真希望你不是，可你偏偏就是，每天都这样。
Entries.Original: You're a terrible boss. I wish that you weren't, but you are. Every day.

Entries.Value:
这条消息旨在告知您，您可以调整与“窗户偷窥”相关的设置。

偷窥模拟市民即将出现在房屋窗外进行窥视。根据您的设置，这种情况会不时发生。

由于这种遭遇对某些玩家来说可能比较震惊，您可以禁用此功能或调整其行为逻辑。请使用下方的按钮来决定窗户偷窥者的行为模式。

Entries.Original:
This message is meant to inform you about the possibility of adjusting settings related to Window Peeping.

A Peeping Sim is about to peep through the windows of the house. This will happen from time to time, depending on your settings.
As this can be a shocking encounter to some, you can disable this feature or adjust its behavior. Use the button below to decide about the behavior of Window Peeping Sims.

If you already adjusted your Window Peeping settings you can safely ignore this message.

Entries.Value: 请输入您的SimHub账号用户名。

欢迎来到 SimHub @{1.String}，全球领先的成人内容服务平台！ 我们很高兴您的加入，并想为您分享一些关于如何经营全新创作者账号的小贴士！ 作为一名新晋创作者，您需要通过分享热辣照片供大家探索，以此来提升公众知名度。 利用公开照片制造热度可以吸引那些愿意为独家独特内容付费的新用户。 而向订阅者分享照片则能保持付费会员的参与度，让他们觉得您的账号值得支持。 成功的关键在于保持势头、连贯性和公平性。您的粉丝规模越大，赚的钱就越多。现在，快脱掉衣服，开始给我们发送一些性感的内容吧！ 记得每天检查您的控制面板，以便获取社区当前热门趋势的信息。 若要拍摄可以分享的私人照片，请点击一名裸体或正在进行性行为的模拟市民，选择 邪恶 -> 拍摄照片。
Entries.Original: Welcome to SimHub @{1.String}, the world's leading adult content service! We're glad to have you on board and want to share with you some tips on how to begin running your brand new creator account! As a new creator, you will have to gain public popularity by sharing spicy pictures for everyone to discover. Generating interest with public pictures attracts new users who are willing to pay for exclusive unique content. Sharing pictures with subscribers keeps your paying members engaged and makes your account worth supporting. It's all about keeping Momentum, Consistency, and Fairness. The bigger you grow, the more money you earn. Now jump out of your clothes and start sending us some sexy content. Remember to Check your Dashboard daily if you want to receive information on what is currently hot with our community. To take Private Pictures you can share, click on a naked Sim or Sim having sex and go to Wicked -> Take Photo.

Entries.Value: 欢迎回到 SimHub @{1.String}，对于您的账号此前遇到的问题，我们深表遗憾。 好消息！ 您的账号已部分恢复！您最后的粉丝数、订阅者以及待提现金额都已找回！ 希望这次故障不是由于您删除了任何文件（尤其是那些复杂的存档数据文件）所导致的。
Entries.Original: Welcome Back to SimHub @{1.String}, we're sorry you have been experiencing problems with your account. Good News! Your account has been partially recovered! Your last followers count, subscribers, and payout amount are back! Hopefully this issue wasn't caused by you deleting any files, especially any complex save data files.

Entries.Value: 属于此群体的模拟市民将不会对其他群体成员产生性嫉妒。
Entries.Original: Sims within this group are prevented from sex jealousy towards other Sims outside of this group.

Entries.Value: 勾选后，{0.SimFirstName}将遵循欲望设置。\n取消勾选后，{0.SimFirstName}将不会产生欲望，也不会感受到欲望的影响。
Entries.Original: Check for {0.SimFirstName} to follow Desire settings.\nUncheck to prevent {0.SimFirstName} from gaining desire and feeling effects of desire.

Entries.Value: 勾选后，{0.SimFirstName}将遵循暧昧注视设置。\n取消勾选后，{0.SimFirstName}将不会做出暧昧注视行为。
Entries.Original: Check for {0.SimFirstName} to follow Suggestive Looks settings.\nUncheck to prevent {0.SimFirstName} from performing suggestive looks.

Entries.Value: 增加或减少其他模拟市民对{0.SimFirstName}的感知吸引力等级。此值将加到{0.SimFirstName}的基础吸引力等级（范围为 -2 到 3）上。数值越高，其他模拟市民眼中的{0.SimFirstName}就越有吸引力。
Entries.Original: Increase/Decrease the attractiveness level of how other Sims perceive {0.SimFirstName}. This value is added to {0.SimFirstName}'s Attractiveness level, which ranges from -2 to 3. Higher values make other Sims perceive {0.SimFirstName} as more attractive.

Entries.Value: 普通人特质的模拟市民只想融入集体，获得归属感。他们缺乏鲜明的个性，很少引人注目。
Entries.Original: Everyman Sims just want to belong and feel like a part of something. They lack any distinctive identity and rarely stand out.

Entries.Value: 愚者型模拟市民为快乐、幽默和搞怪而活。然而，他们通常缺乏责任感，总是沉溺于玩耍而荒废时间，无法专注于自己的目标。
Entries.Original: Jester Sims live for the moments of joy, humor, and silliness. Often, though, they are irresponsible, wasting time by playing around instead of focusing on their goals.

Entries.Value: 贤者型模拟市民追求智慧，致力于在各种境遇中寻找真理。然而，这种求知的天性可能导致他们思考过度，反而导致行动力不足。
Entries.Original: Sage Sims seek wisdom and focus on finding the truth in every situation. However, their knowledge-seeking nature might cause them to think too much and not act enough.

Entries.Value: 艺术家型模拟市民渴望表达和美感，他们擅长通过创作来理解世界。然而，他们往往过于追求完美，或者容易陷入艺术家的忧郁，导致在现实生活中显得有些脱节。
Entries.Original: Artist Sims strive to create things of enduring value and achieve their vision. In many cases, however, the fear of not being exceptional prevents their growth.

Entries.Value: 英雄型模拟市民渴望通过展现勇气来证明自己的价值与自信。然而，这可能导致他们变得傲慢——他们会通过挑剔他人的过错来获得优越感，甚至故意挑起争端。
Entries.Original: Hero Sims are eager to demonstrate the courage to prove their worth and confidence. Subsequently, they might end up appearing arrogant by looking for faults in others to feel good about themselves or pick fights.

Entries.Value: 照顾者型模拟市民受同理心与怜悯心的驱动，渴望保护并照顾他人。不幸的是，这种善良的本性极易被他人利用，沦为达成个人目的的工具。
Entries.Original: Caregiver Sims are driven by their empathy and compassion to protect and care. Unfortunately, others can exploit their good nature for their own ends.

Entries.Value: 天真型模拟市民的积极与快乐拥有振奋人心的强大力量。然而，他们有时会显得非常幼稚，而那种过分乐观的视角也常使他们表现得过于天真无邪。
Entries.Original: Innocent Sims positivity and happiness has a great power to uplift others. But they can appear very childish and their optimistic perspective causes them to be too naive.

Entries.Value: 情人型模拟市民渴望亲密关系，为体验愉悦而活，且充满了激情。然而，由于他们极度渴望激起他人的爱意，这使他们面临失去自我认同的风险，并显得有些肤浅。
Entries.Original: Lover Sims crave intimacy, live to experience pleasure, and are very passionate. Nonetheless, with their desire to evoke love in others, they risk losing their own identity and appear shallow.

Entries.Value: 阴险型模拟市民总是心怀鬼胎，为了达成目的不计后果。他们游走在道德边缘，甚至以牺牲他人为代价来换取自己的成功。
Entries.Original: Sinister Sims are always up to no good, trying to achieve their goals no matter the consequences.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}对另一位模拟市民留下了良好印象。这将有助于建立良好的关系并培养更深层的信任。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} formed a positive impression with another Sim. This should help to shape a good relationship and build more trust.

Entries.Value: 提及最近的令人沮丧的消息

Entries.Original: {0.SimName} shows signs of the {1.String} personality archetype.\n\n{2.String}

Entries.Value: 由于他们性格相合，{0.SimName}对{1.SimName}留下了良好的印象。这将有助于他们建立和谐的关系。
Entries.Original: Thanks to their compatible personalities, {0.SimName} formed a positive impression towards {1.SimName}. This will help build a harmonious relationship between them.

Entries.Value: (来自见到毫无吸引力的市民)
世上有长得丑的模拟市民，还有一种则是令人作呕的。不幸的是{0.SimFirstName}的目光偏偏撞上了那种让他格外反感的类型。最好赶紧移开视线，否则{0.SimFirstName}恐怕真的要感到生理不适了。
Entries.Original: There are ugly Sims and then there are utterly repulsive Sims. Unfortunately, {0.SimFirstName}'s eyes were bombarded by the sight of a Sim that they find particularly abhorrent. It would be best to look away, otherwise {0.SimFirstName} might end up feeling truly ill.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}的目光被一道真正令人惊艳的风景所吸引，一个特别迷人的模拟市民刚好进入了{M0.他的}{F0.她的}视野。这位堪称“完美标本”的市民瞬间夺走了{0.SimFirstName}全部的注意力，他们正努力合上惊掉在地上的下巴。如果说有些时刻令人心跳加速，那么此时此刻简直让人的心跳都要停摆了！
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}'s eyes were caressed by a truly magnificent sight as a particularly appealing Sim just entered {M0.his}{F0.her} view. This fine specimen of a Sim now has {0.SimFirstName}'s undivided attention as they try to pick their jaw up from the floor. There are heartpounding moments but this one here is HEARTSTOPPING!

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}的脑海中浮现出某位市民的点点滴滴。对方身上那些曾令{M0.他}{F0.她}满心欢喜的特质，如今却让{M0.他}{F0.她}难以集中精力去思考除此之外的任何事情。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}'s mind is rushed with memories of a certain Sim in particular. All the qualities that brought joy to {M0.his}{F0.her} eyes have made it a hard task to think about anything else.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}突然发现{0.SimPronounReflexive}正强烈地渴望着某人——{M0.他}{F0.她}深爱的伴侣。在爱情的领域里，{M0.他}{F0.她}简直中了头奖，世上再没有人比这位相伴一生的伴侣更契合自己的欲望了。仅仅是想到对方，就让{0.SimFirstName}对其陪伴心生向往。{M0.他}{F0.她}一种想要拥抱并爱抚这位夺心挚友的强烈渴望，正如同烈火般燃烧。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} suddenly finds {0.SimPronounReflexive} craving a certain someone, their beloved Spouse. {M0.He}{F0.She} hit the jackpot in the field of love, there isn't anyone who suits {M0.his}{F0.her} desires more than their loving partner in life. Just thinking of them has {0.SimFirstName} yearning for their presence. A burning desire to hold and to love this Sim that has captured {M0.his}{F0.her} heart.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}注意到了一位很有魅力的人，心里暗暗希望对方也能对自己产生好感。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} noticed someone attractive and is hoping they will find interest in them too.

Entries.Value: 哇，真是位完美的市民！{0.SimName}刚才甚至忘了自己在想什么，回过神来发现自己正呆呆地望着{1.SimName}。那位{M1.男人}{F1.女人}身上散发着太多令 {0.SimFirstName}心跳加速的特质，那频率简直像是在跑一场越野马拉松。他那{M1.英俊}{F1.美丽}的面容完美契合了{0.SimFirstName}的所有幻想，仿佛造物主在雕刻这位市民时，就是专门为{0.SimFirstName}量身定制的一样。\n\n现在唯一要做的就是合上惊掉的下巴，并鼓起勇气去和这位{M1.阿多尼斯}{F1.阿芙洛狄忒}搭讪。希望{1.SimFirstName}能足够仁慈，对{0.SimFirstName}的好感给予回应。
Entries.Original: Wow, what a Sim! {0.SimName} just stopped what they were thinking about for a moment and found themselves staring at {1.SimName}. That {M1.man}{F1.woman} has so many of the qualities that make {0.SimFirstName}'s heart race, as if it were on a cross country marathon. Their {M1.handsome}{F1.beautiful} features meet {0.SimFirstName}'s desires so readily that it's almost as if whatever created such a Sim sculpted {1.SimPronounObjective} specifically for {0.SimFirstName}.\n\nNow the only thing left is to pick up their jaw and work up the courage to speak to such an {M1.Adonis}{F1.Aphrodite}. Hopefully, {1.SimFirstName} will be kind enough to reciprocate {0.SimFirstName}'s feelings.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}的脑海里满是对{1.SimName}的美好回忆，对方的身影不断浮现。手头的事情早已被抛在脑后，{1.SimFirstName}的种种特质如同强烈回响，带给{0.SimFirstName}满心欢喜。上次的相遇太过短暂，如今{0.SimFirstName}渴望更多相处的机会。能和{1.SimFirstName}再次见面的那一刻，越早到来越好。\n\n这样的人本就不多，理应被好好珍惜。{0.SimFirstName}能遇到一个完全契合{M0.他的}{F0.她的}心意、满足所有憧憬的人，实在是天大的幸运，甚至称得上是奇迹。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}'s head remembers {1.SimName} fondly as memories of {1.SimPronounObjective} begin to populate {0.SimPronounPossessiveDependent} mind. The task at hand is just an afterthought as qualities of {1.SimFirstName} manifest themselves as strong echoes that bring {0.SimFirstName} intense amounts of joy. Their encounter last time was too brief and now {0.SimFirstName} is thirsty for more. When the chance to meet with {1.SimFirstName} arrives, it will not have come soon enough.\n\nSims like these should be cherished, there aren't that many of them out there and it was a stroke of good luck or even a miracle that allowed {0.SimFirstName} to meet one that ticked off so many of {M0.his}{F0.her} wishes and desires.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}的梦境将{0.SimPronounObjective}带入了一种涅槃般的极乐境界，在那梦中，{M0.他}{F0.她}正回味着与{1.SimName}共度的珍贵时光。这简直如同梦幻一般，这位迷人的“尤物”竟会在{0.SimFirstName}入眠时潜入其梦境。世上怎会真的存在如此契合自己的完美人选？\n\n虽然仍心存疑虑，但很快便有一项证据为{0.SimFirstName}揭示了真相：在那脑海中{M1.自信阔步}{F1.翩翩起舞}的{1.SimFirstName}幻影，与现实中的本人相比依然显得黯然失色。亲眼见到、甚至触摸到真实的{1.SimName}所带来的幸福感，足以让这梦境所能提供的一切快乐都显得微不足道。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName}'s dreams bring {0.SimPronounObjective} to a state of nirvana as they recollect their cherished moments with {1.SimName}. It's almost surreal, this ravishing creature that stalks {0.SimPronounObjective} as {M0.he}{F0.she} slumbers. How could someone so perfect for them actually exist?\n\nThough still unsure there is one proof that soon sheds light to the truth for {0.SimFirstName}, the manifestation of {1.SimFirstName} that {M1.strides confidently}{F1.dances gracefully} within {M0.his}{F0.her} mind is still but a pale comparison to the true thing. The happiness from seeing and even touching the corporeal {1.SimName} dwarfs the joy that this dream can ever provide.

Entries.Value: 人们常说雷电不会两次击中同一个地方。但请把这话告诉{0.SimFirstName} 吧，{M0.他}{F0.她}不仅找到了梦中情人，还奇迹般地与{1.SimPronounObjective}步入了婚姻的殿堂。\n\n每当此时，{0.SimFirstName}总会提醒自己，能与像{1.SimName}这样迷人的{M1.男神}{F1.女神}结为连理是多么幸运。能被这样一个充满魅力的灵魂所爱，并全心全意地去爱对方，给{M0.他}{F0.她}的内心带来了难以言喻的喜悦。即便在结婚后的现在，{M0.他}{F0.她}对挚爱伴侣的那份迷恋，依然像永恒的太阳神赫利俄斯般炽烈耀眼。
Entries.Original: They say lightning never strikes the same place twice. Well tell that to {0.SimFirstName}, {M0.he}{F0.she} found the Sim of {M0.his}{F0.her} dreams and by some miracle, got to marry {1.SimPronounObjective} too.\n\nThere are times like this when {0.SimFirstName} likes to remind {0.SimPronounReflexive} just how lucky they are to be married to a ravishing {M1.hunk}{F1.goddess} like {1.SimName}. To be able to love and be loved by such a captivating creature brings incomprehensible joy to {M0.his}{F0.her} heart and the attraction they have for their beloved partner still endures like an undying blaze even now.

Entries.Value:
这是那种让{0.SimFirstName}永远不想醒来的美梦。在梦中只有一个焦点，一个占据了{M0.他}{F0.她}全部思绪的存在，那就是{1.SimName}。

如此美妙的化身让{0.SimFirstName}彻底沉醉，{M0.他}{F0.她}抛开所有杂念，只为凝视{1.SimFirstName}的每一处特征——那身体的每一条轮廓、每一抹神韵，以及成就这位惊艳市民的所有独特细节。{0.SimFirstName}视这些特质为珍宝。随着梦境继续，{M0.他}{F0.她}对这位偷走了自己灵魂与心房的市民愈发痴迷。

到最后，{M0.他}{F0.她}愿意醒来的唯一理由，便是那个真实的{1.SimName}正在梦境的另一端守候。
Entries.Original:
It's dreams like this that {0.SimFirstName} never wants to wake up from. In it there is but one focal point, one element that pervades all thoughts within {M0.his}{F0.her} mind and that is {1.SimName}.

Such a wondrous manifestation has {0.SimFirstName} utterly enthralled as {M0.he}{F0.she} abandons all other thoughts in order to contemplate {1.SimFirstName}'s every feature, every contour and nuance of {M1.his}{F1.her} body and every discernible detail that makes this breathtaking Sim unique. {0.SimFirstName} absolutely cherishes those factors and as the dream continues, they become more and more enraptured by this Sim that has stolen both {M0.his}{F0.her} mind and {M0.his}{F0.her} heart.

In the end, there is only one reason as to why they'd consider waking up, and that is the real {1.SimName} waiting for them on the other side.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}注意到{1.SimFirstName}投向自己的目光越来越频繁，且愈发灼热。对方那专注且强烈的凝视，似乎正暗示着这是一个将关系推向更亲密阶段的大好时机。\n\n{0.SimFirstName}是打算接受{1.SimFirstName}的示好，还是无视{1.SimPronounObjective}？
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} has noticed that {1.SimFirstName}'s eyes are lingering on them more and more. There's an intensity to their stare and with their attention fixed squarely upon them this may be the chance to move things into a more intimate direction.\n\nIs {0.SimFirstName} going to accept {1.SimFirstName}'s advances or ignore {1.SimPronounObjective}?

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}感觉到另一位模拟市民的目光正死死地锁在自己身上。从对方闪烁的眼神中可以清楚地看出，{1.SimFirstName}对{0.SimFirstName}产生了极其浓厚的兴趣。 如果{0.SimFirstName}尝试将关系推向更亲密的层面，成功的机会很大。 {0.SimFirstName}是打算接受{1.SimFirstName}的示好，还是无视{1.SimPronounObjective}？
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} is under the impression that another Sim has their gaze fixed directly upon {0.SimPronounObjective}. With a glimmer in their eyes it's plain to see that {1.SimFirstName} has an intense interest in {0.SimFirstName}. If {0.SimFirstName} tries to push things to a more intimate level they may have a good chance at success. Is {0.SimFirstName} going to accept {1.SimFirstName}'s advances or ignore {1.SimPronounObjective}?

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}接受了{1.SimFirstName}的示好。{1.SimPronounSubjective|xxUpper}看起来兴奋不已，正满心期待着与{0.SimFirstName}共度一段激情时光。在接下来的几个小时里，{M0.他}{F0.她}可以对 {1.SimPronounObjective}做任何想做的事。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} has accepted {1.SimFirstName}'s advances. {1.SimPronounSubjective|xxUpper} looks excited, anticipating the opportunity of experiencing a passionate moment with {0.SimFirstName}. {M0.He}{F0.She} can do whatever {M0.he}{F0.she} wants with {1.SimPronounObjective} for the next few hours.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}无视了{1.SimFirstName}的示好，{1.SimPronounSubjective|xxUpper}不该再用那些花招去骚扰 {0.SimPronounObjective}了。
Entries.Original: {0.SimFirstName} ignored {1.SimFirstName}'s advances. {1.SimPronounSubjective|xxUpper} shouldn't bother {0.SimPronounObjective} with {1.SimPronounPossessiveDependent} antics anymore.
It's a little too late to respond now.

Entries.Value: 真搞不懂，为什么社交时一定要面对面说话。至少在{0.SimFirstName}瞥见聊天对象那诱人的臀部曲线后，是这么觉得的。
Entries.Original: It's a shame that society decided that when you talk to someone you should be facing each other. At least that's what {0.SimFirstName} thinks after {M0.he}{F0.she} noticed the very attractive butt shape of {M0.his}{F0.her} conversation partner.

Entries.Value: 为什么{0.SimFirstName}的对话者要有这么引人注目的胸部，而且{0.SimFirstName}怎么就不能阻止{0.SimPronounReflexive}偷看呢？！
Entries.Original: Why must {0.SimFirstName}'s converser have such eye-catching breasts, and why can't {0.SimFirstName} stop {0.SimPronounReflexive} from trying to catch a glimpse of them?!

Entries.Value: 那个模拟市民肌肉真好……好到[{0.SimFirstName}]忍不住一直盯着看。
Entries.Original: That Sim has some really nice muscles... so nice in fact that {0.SimFirstName} can't stop trying to look at them.

Entries.Value: 哎呀，这结果可真是差强人意。听起来{1.SimName}似乎并不乐意被{0.SimFirstName}打听{M1.他的}{F1.她的}偏好。
Entries.Original: Well, that could have gone better. It sounds like {1.SimName} didn't appreciate {0.SimFirstName} asking for {M1.his}{F1.her} preferences.

Entries.Value: 在一阵短暂的沉默之后，{1.SimFirstName}表示{M1.他}{F1.她}并没有什么特别值得一提的内容能让{0.SimFirstName}满意。或许在{1.SimFirstName}眼中，{0.SimFirstName}已经足够有吸引力了。
Entries.Original: Following a few brief moments of silence, {1.SimName} expressed that {M1.he}{F1.she} doesn't have any noteworthy things to say that would satisfy {0.SimFirstName}. Perhaps {0.SimFirstName} is already attractive enough in the eyes of {1.SimFirstName}.

Entries.Value: 唉，这问了等于白问。向{1.SimName}打听{2.SimName}的情况，结果发现 {M1.他}{F1.她}对{2.SimFirstName}的偏好其实一无所知。
Entries.Original: Well, that wasn't very useful at all. After asking {1.SimName} about {2.SimName} it was found that {M1.he}{F1.she} doesn't really know anything about {2.SimFirstName}'s preferences.

Entries.Value: 关于{2.SimName}的事，我什么都不会告诉你。
Entries.Original: I'm not telling you anything about {2.SimName}.

Entries.Value: 在{0.SimFirstName}环顾四周寻找有吸引力的面孔后，{M0.他}{F0.她}注意到了一个让{M0.他}{F0.她}心动的人。\n\n请留意那个跳动的心形符号来识别吸引力。
Entries.Original: After {0.SimFirstName} finished scoping the room for attractive faces, {M0.he}{F0.she} noticed one that sparked {M0.his}{F0.her} interest.\n\nSpot pulsating hearts to recognize attraction.

Entries.Value: 在 {0.SimFirstName}环顾四周寻找有吸引力的面孔后，{M0.他}{F0.她}注意到了几个让{M0.他}{F0.她}心动的人。\n\n请留意那些跳动的心形符号来识别吸引力。
Entries.Original: After {0.SimFirstName} finished scoping the room for attractive faces, {M0.he}{F0.she} noticed a few that sparked {M0.his}{F0.her} interest.\n\nSpot pulsating hearts to recognize attraction.

Entries.Value: {0.SimFirstName}在房间里打量了一圈，想寻找有没有吸引人的面孔，结果没发现任何让{M0.他}{F0.她}感兴趣的人。
Entries.Original: After {0.SimFirstName} finished scoping the room for attractive faces, {M0.he}{F0.she} hasn't noticed anybody interesting.

Entries.Value: 魔镜，魔镜，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在{0.SimFirstName}对着镜子仔细打量了{0.SimPronounReflexive}之后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得自己的样子非常没有吸引力，而且世界上大多数人肯定也是这么想的。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks Very Unattractive, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 魔镜，魔镜，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在{0.SimFirstName}对着镜子仔细打量完{0.SimPronounReflexive}之后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得自己看起来毫无吸引力，而且觉得全世界大概都是这么想的。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks quite Unattractive, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 魔镜，魔镜，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在{0.SimFirstName}对着镜子仔细打量完{0.SimPronounReflexive}之后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得{M0.他}{F0.她}的样子相当 普通，而且世上大多数人也会这么认为。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks really Basic, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 魔镜，魔镜，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在{0.SimFirstName}对着镜子仔细打量完{0.SimPronounReflexive}之后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得{M0.他}{F0.她}的样子相当有吸引力—— 事实上，全世界的大多数人也都是这么想的。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks quite Attractive, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 魔镜，魔镜，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在{0.SimFirstName}对着镜子仔细打量完{0.SimPronounReflexive}之后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得自己的样子有吸引力 —— 事实上，全世界的大多数人也都是这么想的。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks Very Attractive, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 墙上的镜子啊，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n在 {0.SimFirstName}对着镜子自我打量了一番后，{M0.他}{F0.她}觉得{M0.他}{F0.她}看起来极具吸引力 —— 事实上，全世界的大多数人也都是这么想的。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\nAfter {0.SimFirstName} finished checking {0.SimPronounReflexive} out in the mirror, {M0.he}{F0.she} thinks {M0.he}{F0.she} looks Extremely Attractive, and so thinks the majority of the world.

Entries.Value: 魔镜魔镜在墙上，谁是世界上最漂亮的人？\n\n{0.SimFirstName}凝视着镜子，然而…镜子里只有{0.SimPronounObjective}自己回望的倒影。
Entries.Original: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall, Who’s the Prettiest of Them All?\n\n{0.SimFirstName} looks into the mirror and it's... just {0.SimPronounObjective} looking back.

Entries.Value: 在整个对话过程中，{0.SimFirstName}隐约感觉到{1.SimFirstName}觉得{0.SimPronounObjective}相当有吸引力。这让{0.SimPronounObjective}不禁开始琢磨，{M0.他}{F0.她}这种感觉是否准确。
Entries.Original: Throughout the conversation, {0.SimFirstName} got the impression that {1.SimFirstName} finds {0.SimPronounObjective} quite attractive, making {0.SimPronounObjective} wonder if {M0.he}{F0.she} has the right idea.

Entries.Value: 肤浅的模拟市民只看重他人的外貌，只要对方是极具吸引力的人，他么就会同意与其嘿咻。
Entries.Original: Shallow Sims only care about others looks and will agree to have sex with anybody who is at least Very Attractive.

Entries.Value: 外貌令人反感的模拟市民会发现吸引他人变得更加困难。大多数注视他们的目光都会对其外表持有普遍的负面倾向。

Entries.Value: 选择对所有模拟市民的偏好。
选择对男性模拟市民的偏好。
选择对女性模拟市民的偏好。
所有的吸引力偏好都是根据每个模拟市民的最佳发展方法来设定的。
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the best development method for each Sim.

Entries.Value: 所有吸引力偏好都是根据模拟人生浪漫伴侣的吸引人特质发展而来的。\n\n（需要已存在的浪漫伴侣。）
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the Sim romantic partners attractive traits.\n\n(Requires existing romantic partners.)

Entries.Value: 所有吸引力偏好都是根据模拟人生父母的吸引人特质发展而来的。\n\n（需要已有家庭父母。）
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the Sim parents attractive traits.\n\n(Requires existing family parents.)

Entries.Value: 基于选择的模拟市民开发
所有吸引力偏好都是根据所选模拟市民的迷人特质发展而来的。
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the picked Sims attractive traits.

Entries.Value: 吸引力模拟市民选择器\n\n
选择作为吸引力偏好基础的模拟市民。
Entries.Original: Pick Sims that will be used as the base for attractiveness preferences.

Entries.Value: 根据模拟市民自身的吸引特质发展
Entries.Original: Develop based on Sim own Attractive Traits

Entries.Value: 所有的吸引力偏好，都是根据模拟市民自身的吸引特质发展而来的。
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the Sim own attractive traits.

Entries.Value: 所有的吸引力偏好，都是根据模拟市民自身的吸引特质发展而来的。
Entries.Original: Develop based on Most Common Attractive Traits

Entries.Value: 所有的吸引力偏好，都是根据模拟世界中所有模拟市民最常见的吸引特质发展而来的。
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are developed based on the most common attractive traits of all Sims in the world.

Entries.Value: 所有的吸引力偏好都是随机的。
Entries.Original: All of the attractiveness preferences are random.

Entries.Value: 轻度发展模式将仅为选定的吸引特质发展正面偏好。\n使用轻度模式，将使模拟市民之间的吸引力更趋于普遍。
Entries.Original: Light Development Strength will develop only positive preferences for a select group of Attractive Traits.\nUsing the Light Mode will produce results that lean towards more attractiveness between Sims.

Entries.Value: 中度发展模式将为所有吸引特质发展出以正面为主、偶尔负面的偏好。\n使用中度模式，将产生吸引力与无吸引力平衡共存的结果。
Entries.Original: Moderate Development Strength will develop mostly positive preferences with occasional negative preferences for all Attractive Traits.\nUsing the Moderate Mode will produce a balanced mix of attractiveness and unattractiveness.

Entries.Value: 重度发展模式将为所有吸引特质发展出同等数量的正面与负面偏好。\n使用重度模式，将使模拟市民之间更倾向于互相无感。
Entries.Original: Heavy Development Strength will develop an equal amount of positive and negative preferences for all Attractive Traits.\nUsing the Heavy Mode will produce results that lean towards more unattractiveness between Sims.

Entries.Value: 您即将根据适合每位模拟市民的最佳发展方法，为所选模拟市民发展吸引力偏好。\n\n此操作将覆盖所选模拟市民现有的所有吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the best development method for each Sim.


This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
您即将根据每位所选模拟市民的恋爱伴侣（无论是正式伴侣还是外遇对象），为他们发展吸引力偏好。
在发展中会考虑到性别、取向、神秘种族类型、体型、头发、胡须、眼睛颜色、皮肤细节以及着装等因素。

此操作将覆盖所选模拟市民现有的所有吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the romantic partners (official or affairs) of each individual selected Sim.
Elements like sex, gender, occult, body shape, hair, facial hair, eye color, skin details, and clothing are considered when developing new Attractiveness Preferences.

This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
你即将根据所选模拟市民家庭的父母来为这些模拟市民设定吸引力偏好。
性别、性取向、神秘属性、体型、头发、面部毛发、眼睛颜色、皮肤细节和服装等因素都会被考虑在内以开发新的吸引力偏好。

此操作将覆盖所选模拟市民现有的任何吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the family parents of each individual selected Sim.
Elements like sex, gender, occult, body shape, hair, facial hair, eye color, skin details, and clothing are considered when developing new Attractiveness Preferences.

This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
你即将根据选定模拟市民的吸引力特质来设定他们的偏好。
性别、身份、神秘属性、体型、头发、面部毛发、眼睛颜色、皮肤细节和服装等元素都将被考虑在内以开发新的吸引力偏好。

此操作将覆盖所选模拟市民现有的任何吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the picked Sims attractiveness traits.
Elements like sex, gender, occult, body shape, hair, facial hair, eye color, skin details, and clothing are considered when developing new Attractiveness Preferences.

This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
你即将根据所选模拟市民的吸引力特质来设定他们的偏好。
性别、身份、神秘属性、体型、头发、面部毛发、眼睛颜色、皮肤细节和服装等元素都将被考虑在内以开发新的吸引力偏好。

此操作将覆盖所选模拟市民现有的任何吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the attractiveness traits of each individual selected Sim.
Elements like sex, gender, occult, body shape, hair, facial hair, eye color, skin details, and clothing are considered when developing new Attractiveness Preferences.

This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
你即将根据全世界所有模拟市民最常见的吸引力特征，为选定的模拟市民开发新的吸引力偏好。
性别、性取向、神秘属性、体型、头发、面部毛发、眼睛颜色、皮肤细节和服装等因素都会被纳入考虑范围。

此操作将覆盖选定模拟市民现有的任何吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims based on the most common attractiveness traits of all Sims in the world.
Elements like sex, gender, occult, body shape, hair, facial hair, eye color, skin details, and clothing are considered when developing new Attractiveness Preferences.

This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value:
你即将为选定的模拟市民随机生成吸引力偏好。


此操作将覆盖选定模拟市民现有的任何吸引力偏好。
Entries.Original:
You're about to develop random Attractiveness Preferences for the selected Sims.


This action will override any existing Attractiveness Preferences of the selected Sims.

Entries.Value: 吸引力偏好正在发展中。鉴于涉及的模拟市民数量，此过程大约需要{0.Number}秒。\n\n您可以在发展过程中继续游戏。
Entries.Original: Attractiveness Preferences are being currently developed. With the number of Sims involved this may take around {0.Number} seconds.\n\nYou can continue playing while the developing is in progress.

Entries.Value: 选择{0.SimName}喜欢和不喜欢的元素。
Entries.Original: Select elements liked and disliked by {0.SimName}.

Entries.Value: 选择许多模拟市民喜欢和不喜欢的元素。
Entries.Original: Select elements liked and disliked by many Sims.

Entries.Value: 要素“{0.String}”同时被标记为喜欢和不喜欢。
Entries.Original: Element '{0.String}' is liked and disliked at the same time.

Entries.Value: 模拟市民的偏好由少于 10 项的喜欢与不喜欢的要素构成。\n拥有较少好恶的模拟市民，通常会因缺乏明确的偏好而觉得他人缺乏吸引力。
Entries.Original: Sim preferences consist of less than the total of 10 likes and dislikes.\nSims with few likes and dislikes will usually see others as unattractive due to lack of defined preference.
